questions.template: What is the gauge hydrostatic pressure at {h} m below the water surface? (ρ = 1000 kg/m³, g = 9.8 m/s²)
A liquid of density {rho} kg/m³ is at a depth of {h} m. What is the gauge pressure? (g = 9.8 m/s²)
A diver is at {h} m depth in seawater (ρ = 1025 kg/m³). What is the gauge pressure at that depth? (g = 9.8 m/s²)
What is the total pressure at {h} m depth in water? Atmospheric pressure is {p0} Pa. (ρ = 1000 kg/m³, g = 9.8 m/s²)
